title: Trollface emoji
description: Replace an ugly troll face with a funny Trollface
body:
One evening I was mining and crafting on one server when a sudden thought sneaked into my mind: "Why there's no emoji for Trollface?"

Requirements: None

Protip: Have something like Symbol Chat installed for quick access to emojis

What this pack does:
# ![The only change done](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61db8535d74a10bcb428f21b7c82bf3177a48e0d.png)
